title: campanula kermanica
intro: Campanula kermanica, also known as Kerman bellflower, is a flowering plant in the bellflower family (Campanulaceae) native to Iran. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Campanula kermanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Campanula kermanica is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
